        <!DOCTYPE html>
        <html>
        <head>
        <meta charset="UTF-8">
        <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
        <title>Écoles fermées</title>
        <style>
        body{
        font-family:
        -apple-system,
        BlinkMacSystemFont,
        "Segoe UI",
        Roboto,
        "Helvetica Neue",
        Arial,
        sans-serif;
        }
        .school {
        padding: 10px;
        margin-bottom: 8px;
        border-radius: 6px;
        }
        .open {
        background-color: #e6f4ea;
        }
        .closed {
        background-color: #fdecea;
        }
        .nd {
        background-color: #f0f0f0;10:34 2026-02-27
        }
        #schools {
        width: 100%;
        border-collapse: collapse;
        }
        #schools th, #schools td {
        padding: 12px 10px;
        vertical-align: top;
        }
        #schools thead tr {
        border-bottom: 2px solid #ddd;
        }
        #schools tbody tr {
        border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
        }
        /* Mobile: transforme chaque ligne en "carte" */
        @media (max-width: 720px) {
        #schools thead {
        display: none;
        }
        #schools, #schools tbody, #schools tr, #schools td {
        display: block;
        width: 100%;
        }
        #schools tbody tr {
        border: 1px solid #eee;
        border-radius: 10px;
        margin: 12px 0;
        overflow: hidden; /* important pour border-radius */
        }
        #schools td {
        padding: 12px 14px;
        border: none;
        }
        /* Étiquettes avant les valeurs */
        #schools td:nth-child(2)::before {
        content: "▪️ Cours : ";
        font-weight: 200;
        }
        #schools td:nth-child(3)::before {
        content: "▪️ Service de garde : ";
        font-weight: 200;
        }
        }
        .region-row td{
        padding: 14px 10px;
        font-weight: 800;
        border-top: 2px solid #ddd;
        background: #fafafa;
        }
        @media (max-width: 720px){
        #schools td[style*="padding-left"]{
        padding-left: 2px !important;
        }
        }
        @media (max-width: 720px){
        #schools tr:not(.region-row):not(.css-row) td:first-child{
        padding-left: 10px !important;
        }
        }
        #schools tr:not(.region-row):not(.css-row) td:first-child strong{
        font-weight: 300; /* enlève le bold */
        }
        </style>
        </head>
        <body>
        <h1>Écoles fermées au Québec</h1>
        <input
        id="search"
        type="text"
        placeholder="Rechercher une école, un centre de services scolaire ou une région…"
        style="width:100%;max-width:500px;padding:10px;font-size:15px;margin:15px 0;"
        >
        <div id="lastUpdate" style="margin:10px 0 15px 0;font-size:14px;color:#444;"></div>
        <div style="margin-top:4px; solid #ddd;font-size:14px;color:#555;">
        <strong>n.d.</strong> = L'information n'est pas encore disponible.
        Vérifiez auprès de votre Centre de services scolaire.
        <br></br>
        </div>
        <table id="schools" style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin-top:20px;">
        <thead>
        <tr style="text-align:left;border-bottom:2px solid #ddd;">
        <th style="padding:10px;">Établissement</th>
        <th style="padding:10px;">Cours</th>
        <th style="padding:10px;">Service de garde</th>
        </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody></tbody>
        </table>
        <script>
        const csvUrl = "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSbpkb1SYuK-BMOQSXlbxcqkvWo6imOXjVCwptnPWXHOst2QZ4XCn3QTVti7XyfztGnxUGD50BVoOl3/pub?gid=314921254&single=true&output=csv";
        const CACHE_KEY = "ecoles_csv_cache_v1";
        const CACHE_TTL_MS = 60 * 1000; // 1 minute (tu peux mettre 5 min)
        let allRows = [];
        function formatCours(status) {
        if (status === "Fermé") {
        return '<span style="color:#c62828;font-weight:600;">Suspendus</span>';
        }
        if (status === "Ouvert") {
        return '<span style="color:#2e7d32;font-weight:600;">Classes ouvertes</span>';
        }
        return '<span style="color:#000;">n.d.</span>';
        }
        function formatGarde(status) {
        if (status === "Fermé") {
        return '<span style="color:#c62828;font-weight:600;">Fermé</span>';
        }
        if (status === "Ouvert") {
        return '<span style="color:#2e7d32;font-weight:600;">Ouvert</span>';
        }
        return '<span style="color:#000;">n.d.</span>';
        }
        function render(filterText = "") {
        const tbody = document.querySelector("#schools tbody");
        tbody.innerHTML = "";
        const query = filterText.trim().toLowerCase();
        const autoExpand = query.length >= 5;
        function cssId(regionId, css) {
        return regionId + "-css-" + (css || "Autre").replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/gi, "-").toLowerCase();
        }
        // 1) Filtrer
        const filtered = allRows.filter(r => {
        if (!query) return true;
        return (
        r.name.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
        r.css.toLowerCase().includes(query) ||
        r.region.toLowerCase().includes(query)
        );
        });
        // 2) Regrouper par région
        const groups = {};
        filtered.forEach(r => {
        const region = r.region || "Autre";
        if (!groups[region]) groups[region] = [];
        groups[region].push(r);
        });
        function priorityRank(r) {
        if (r.statutCours === "Fermé") return 0;
        if (r.statutGarde === "Fermé") return 1;
        if (r.statutCours === "n.d." || r.statutGarde === "n.d.") return 3;
        return 2;
        }
        // 3) Rendre les régions (alphabétique)
        Object.keys(groups).sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b,"fr")).forEach(region => {
        const regionId = "region-" + region.replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/gi, "-").toLowerCase();
        // Trier à l'intérieur de la région (priorités + alpha)
        groups[region].sort((a, b) => {
        const pa = priorityRank(a);
        const pb = priorityRank(b);
        if (pa !== pb) return pa - pb;
        const ca = (a.css || "").localeCompare((b.css || ""), "fr");
        if (ca !== 0) return ca;
        return (a.name || "").localeCompare((b.name || ""), "fr");
        });
        const cssGroups = {};
        groups[region].forEach(r => {
        const css = r.css || "Autre";
        if (!cssGroups[css]) cssGroups[css] = [];
        cssGroups[css].push(r);
        });
        // Compter écoles fermées (cours)
        const closedCount = groups[region].filter(r => r.statutCours === "Fermé").length;
        const closedLabel = `${closedCount} ${closedCount > 1 ? "écoles fermées" : "école fermée"}`;
        // Header région
        const headerTr = document.createElement("tr");
        headerTr.className = "region-row";
        headerTr.style.cursor = "pointer";
        headerTr.innerHTML = `
        <td colspan="3">
        <span id="${regionId}-icon" style="display:inline-block;width:18px;">${autoExpand ? "▼" : "▶"}</span>
        ${region}
        <span style="font-weight:400;color:#666;">(${closedLabel})</span>
        </td>
        `;
        tbody.appendChild(headerTr);
        // --- LAZY LOAD ---
        // Si autoExpand est actif (>=5), on rend tout de suite les lignes
        if (autoExpand) {
        Object.keys(cssGroups)
        .sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b,"fr"))
        .forEach(cssName => {
        const cssRegionId = cssId(regionId, cssName);
        // Header CSS (cliquable)
        const cssHeader = document.createElement("tr");
        cssHeader.className = "css-row";
        cssHeader.style.cursor = "pointer";
        cssHeader.setAttribute("data-region", regionId);
        cssHeader.setAttribute("data-css", cssRegionId);
        const cssClosedCount = cssGroups[cssName].filter(r => r.statutCours === "Fermé").length;
        const cssClosedLabel = `${cssClosedCount} ${cssClosedCount > 1 ? "écoles fermées" : "école fermée"}`;
        cssHeader.innerHTML = `
        <td colspan="3" style="padding-left:26px;font-weight:700;">
        <span id="${cssRegionId}-icon" style="display:inline-block;width:18px;">▶</span>
        ${cssName}
        <span style="font-weight:400;color:#666;">(${cssClosedLabel})</span>
        </td>
        `;
        tbody.appendChild(cssHeader);
        // Écoles (avec data-css)
        cssGroups[cssName].forEach(r => {
        const row = document.createElement("tr");
        row.setAttribute("data-region", regionId);
        row.setAttribute("data-css", cssRegionId);
        row.style.display = "table-row";
        row.innerHTML = `
        <td style="padding-left:34px;">
        <strong>${r.name}</strong>
        </td>
        <td>${formatCours(r.statutCours)}</td>
        <td>${formatGarde(r.statutGarde)}</td>
        `;
        tbody.appendChild(row);
        });
        // Toggle CSS
        cssHeader.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation(); // IMPORTANT: sinon ça déclenche aussi le toggle de région
        const rows = Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll(`tr[data-css="${cssRegionId}"]`));
        // on exclut le header CSS lui-même
        const schoolRows = rows.filter(tr => !tr.classList.contains("css-row"));
        const anyVisible = schoolRows.some(tr => tr.style.display !== "none");
        schoolRows.forEach(tr => tr.style.display = anyVisible ? "none" : "table-row");
        document.getElementById(`${cssRegionId}-icon`).textContent = anyVisible ? "▶" : "▼";
        });
        });
        return;
        }
        // Sinon (<5), on ne crée AUCUNE ligne au chargement.
        // On les crée au clic, puis toggle.
        headerTr.addEventListener("click", () => {
        // 1) Si pas encore créé : créer d'abord les CSS headers + écoles (écoles cachées)
        let regionRows = Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll(`tr[data-region="${regionId}"]`));
        if (regionRows.length === 0) {
        Object.keys(cssGroups)
        .sort((a,b)=>a.localeCompare(b,"fr"))
        .reverse() // pour insertion afterend dans le bon ordre visuel
        .forEach(cssName => {
        const cssRegionId = cssId(regionId, cssName);
        const schools = cssGroups[cssName];
        // Écoles (cachées par défaut)
        for (let i = schools.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
        const r = schools[i];
        const row = document.createElement("tr");
        row.setAttribute("data-region", regionId);
        row.setAttribute("data-css", cssRegionId);
        row.style.display = "none";
        row.innerHTML = `
        <td style="padding-left:34px;">
        <strong>${r.name}</strong>
        </td>
        <td>${formatCours(r.statutCours)}</td>
        <td>${formatGarde(r.statutGarde)}</td>
        `;
        headerTr.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", row);
        }
        // Header CSS (caché au départ, affiché quand la région s’ouvre)
        const cssHeader = document.createElement("tr");
        cssHeader.className = "css-row";
        cssHeader.style.cursor = "pointer";
        cssHeader.setAttribute("data-region", regionId);
        cssHeader.setAttribute("data-css", cssRegionId);
        cssHeader.style.display = "none";
        const cssClosedCount = cssGroups[cssName].filter(r => r.statutCours === "Fermé").length;
        const cssClosedLabel = `${cssClosedCount} ${cssClosedCount > 1 ? "écoles fermées" : "école fermée"}`;
        cssHeader.innerHTML = `
        <td colspan="3" style="padding-left:26px;font-weight:700;">
        <span id="${cssRegionId}-icon" style="display:inline-block;width:18px;">▶</span>
        ${cssName}
        <span style="font-weight:400;color:#666;">(${cssClosedLabel})</span>
        </td>
        `;
        headerTr.insertAdjacentElement("afterend", cssHeader);
        // Toggle CSS (montre/cache seulement ses écoles)
        cssHeader.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
        e.stopPropagation(); // ne pas déclencher la région
        const schoolRows = Array.from(
        tbody.querySelectorAll(`tr[data-css="${cssRegionId}"]`)
        ).filter(tr => !tr.classList.contains("css-row"));
        const anyVisible = schoolRows.some(tr => tr.style.display !== "none");
        schoolRows.forEach(tr => tr.style.display = anyVisible ? "none" : "table-row");
        const icon = document.getElementById(`${cssRegionId}-icon`);
        if (icon) icon.textContent = anyVisible ? "▶" : "▼";
        });
        });
        regionRows = Array.from(tbody.querySelectorAll(`tr[data-region="${regionId}"]`));
        }
        // 2) Toggle région : affiche/cache seulement les CSS headers
        const cssHeaders = regionRows.filter(tr => tr.classList.contains("css-row"));
        const regionIsOpen = cssHeaders.some(tr => tr.style.display !== "none");
        if (regionIsOpen) {
        // fermer région => cacher CSS headers + écoles
        regionRows.forEach(tr => tr.style.display = "none");
        document.getElementById(`${regionId}-icon`).textContent = "▶";
        } else {
        // ouvrir région => montrer CSS headers, laisser écoles cachées
        cssHeaders.forEach(tr => tr.style.display = "table-row");
        // reset icônes CSS à ▶ et cacher écoles (au cas où)
        regionRows.forEach(tr => {
        if (!tr.classList.contains("css-row")) tr.style.display = "none";
        });
        cssHeaders.forEach(h => {
        const cssRegionId = h.getAttribute("data-css");
        const icon = document.getElementById(`${cssRegionId}-icon`);
        if (icon) icon.textContent = "▶";
        });
        document.getElementById(`${regionId}-icon`).textContent = "▼";
        }
        });
        }); // <-- ferme le forEach(region => { ... })
        } // <-- ferme la fonction render()
        function formatLastUpdate(dateObj){
        const time = dateObj.toLocaleTimeString("fr-CA", { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit" });
        const date = dateObj.toLocaleDateString("fr-CA", { day: "numeric", month: "long", year: "numeric" });
        return `Dernière mise à jour: ${time} | ${date}`;
        }
        document.getElementById("lastUpdate").textContent = formatLastUpdate(new Date());
        function parseCSV(text) {
        const rows = [];
        let row = [];
        let cur = "";
        let inQuotes = false;
        for (let i = 0; i < text.length; i++) {
        const c = text[i];
        const next = text[i + 1];
        if (c === '"' ) {
        // "" à l'intérieur d'un champ quoted => un vrai "
        if (inQuotes && next === '"') {
        cur += '"';
        i++;
        } else {
        inQuotes = !inQuotes;
        }
        } else if (c === "," && !inQuotes) {
        row.push(cur);
        cur = "";
        } else if ((c === "\n" || c === "\r") && !inQuotes) {
        if (c === "\r" && next === "\n") i++; // CRLF
        row.push(cur);
        rows.push(row);
        row = [];
        cur = "";
        } else {
        cur += c;
        }
        }
        // dernière cellule
        if (cur.length > 0 || row.length > 0) {
        row.push(cur);
        rows.push(row);
        }
        return rows;
        }
        function loadFromCSVText(data){
        const parsed = parseCSV(data);
        const header = parsed[0].map(h => h.trim());
        const idx = (name) => header.indexOf(name);
        const iName = idx("Nom d'établissement");
        const iCSS = idx("Centre de service scolaire");
        const iRegion = idx("Région");
        const iStatutCours = idx("statut_cours");
        const iStatutGarde = idx("statut_garde");
        allRows = parsed.slice(1)
        .filter(cols => cols.length && (cols[iName] || "").trim() !== "")
        .map(cols => ({
        name: (cols[iName] || "").trim(),
        css: (cols[iCSS] || "").trim(),
        region: (cols[iRegion] || "").trim(),
        statutCours: (cols[iStatutCours] || "").trim(),
        statutGarde: (cols[iStatutGarde] || "").trim(),
        }));
        render();
        document.getElementById("loading").style.display = "none";
        }
        // 1) Tenter cache d'abord
        try{
        const cached = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(CACHE_KEY) || "null");
        if (cached && cached.text && cached.time && (Date.now() - cached.time) < CACHE_TTL_MS){
        loadFromCSVText(cached.text); // rendu instantané
        }
        }catch(e){ /* ignore */ }
        // 2) Fetch réseau ensuite (mise à jour)
        fetch(csvUrl, { cache: "no-store" })
        .then(r => r.text())
        .then(text => {
        try{
        localStorage.setItem(CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify({ text, time: Date.now() }));
        }catch(e){ /* ignore */ }
        // si on avait déjà rendu via cache, on rerender avec data fraîche
        loadFromCSVText(text);
        })
        .catch(err => {
        const loading = document.getElementById("loading");
        if (loading) loading.textContent = "Erreur de chargement des données.";
        });
        </script></body>
        </html>
